walkthrough.title: Get started with Commit Sage
walkthrough.description: Pick a provider, set your API key, and generate your first AI-written commit message.
walkthrough.step.pickProvider.title: Pick an AI provider
walkthrough.step.pickProvider.descriptio:
Choose between Gemini, OpenAI, Codestral, or self-hosted Ollama.
[Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22commitSage.provider.type%22)
walkthrough.step.setApiKey.title: Provide credentials
walkthrough.step.setApiKey.description:
API keys are stored in VS Code SecretStorage. Run a Set … API Key command from the Palette.
[Set Gemini API Key](command:commitsage.setApiKey)
walkthrough.step.generate.title: Generate your first commit message
walkthrough.step.generate.description:
Stage some changes, then click the Commit Sage icon in the SCM header — or run the command directly.
[Generate Commit Message](command:commitsage.generateCommitMessage)
